name: Canvas2D Rogue-like
description: Reusable, config-driven turn-based top-down rogue-like: JSON-defined room map, one step per key press with a matching enemy turn, bump-to-attack melee combat, HP, treasure (score), health potions, keys and key-locked doors, win on reaching the exit. Procedural fallback graphics; standalone browser export.
capabilities: turn-based grid movement (player step -> enemy step)
bump-to-attack melee combat with per-enemy HP and damage
treasure (score), health potions, keys and key-locked doors
enemy behaviors: wander, chase (with sight range)
player HP, death (game over), win on reaching the exit
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; missing sprites fall back to procedural drawings
no procedural dungeon generation in v1 — the map is JSON-defined
